name: Senuth De Silva
raw_text: SENUTH DE SILVA Computer Science Undergraduate senuthdesilva43@gmail.com +94 71 980 8282 LinkedIn GitHub Portfolio PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY A motivated Computer Science student with expertise in frontend and backend development and machine learning. Proficient in React, Java, Python, JavaScript, and AWS, with strong database management skills. Experienced in Agile-based project management, including sprint planning, task coordination, requirement analysis, and progress tracking using tools such as JIRA. Passionate about building scalable, innovative, and efficient solutions while continuously learning and applying modern technologies to solve real-world problems. Eager to contribute as an intern while continuously learning and growing in a dynamic tech environment. EDUCATION Bsc(Hons) Computer Science Undergraduate University of Westminster (United kingdom) Informatics Institute of Technology (IIT) Foundation Higher Education in Informatics Institute Of Technology May 2022 GCE O/L 2022 PROJECTS Mind forge fullstack Team member Developed a full-stack e-learning platform that enables learners to self-study web development, earn certifications, and publish technical blogs to showcase expertise. Applied AgileScrum project management practices, including sprint planning, daily stand- Used JIRA to manage user stories, tasks, and sub-tasks tracked progress, priorities, and sprint deliverables.Collaborated with team members to define requirements, estimate tasks, and ensure timely feature delivery. Tecnologies-React js,node js,machine learning ProjectLink Forever(E-Commerce website) Developed a frontend e-commerce website for clothing. using React.js, Node.js and tailwind CSS. featuring dynamic product listings and a clean, user-friendly UI. Planned development milestones and managed feature implementation using basic project scheduling and task breakdown. Object Detection/Cat and dog image prediction Machine Learning Developed and optimized deep learning models for image classification using CNNs, data augmentation, advanced preprocessing, and per formance evaluation, achieving high accuracy and F1- scores. 92.98 , and criteria match of 90.66 accuracy. GitHub Object Recognition GitHub Cat Dog Recognition Chat Application fullstack. Developed an innovative full-stack application utilizing React.js for the frontend and Node.js for the backend, with Firebase as the database solution, ensuring seamless real-time data synchronization and scalability. Restaurant POS System Designed and implemented modular backend in Java using OOP principles. Integrated user authentication, real- time booking updates, and payment simulation. Hotel Management Online Booking Application Designed to streamline hotel operations, automate bookings, and improve customer experience. This full-stack application integrates modern technologies for both frontend and backend. Westminster University Shopping System Technologies-Java,OOP Restful health System Api Technologies-Java fsx CERTIFICATIONS Foundation Certificate in Higher Education in Informatics Institute Of Technology IIT The Complete Full-Stack Web Development Bootcamp Udemy Microsoft Azure Machine Learning Fundamentals Linkdin DevOps Beginners to Advanced with Projects Udemy Project Management Simplified Project Management Institute Python Programming Online course Linkdin TECHNICAL SKILLS Languages Java,Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS3, SQL,Linux Web Technologies React.js, Next.js, Three.js, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Express.js Cloud DevOps AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda),GitHub Actions Backend Frameworks REST Framework Databases MySQL, MongoDB, AI/ML TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenAI LEADERSHIP SKILLS Member of LEO CLUB of IIT (2022-2025) Member and event coordinator of Rotaract CLUB of IIT (2022-2025) Member of IEEE Computer Society (2025) Member of IEEE Club. Main batch representative in level 4 and Level 5 SOFT SKILLS Leadership Skills Time Management Problem-Solving Skills Communication Skills Team Player a daptability
